#+TITLE: Calendar-style entries (no TODO state, just timestamps)
#+CATEGORY: Calendar

* Standup <2026-05-07 Thu 09:30>
Recurring meeting.

* Vacation <2026-06-10 Wed>--<2026-06-17 Wed>
Out of office, the date range should produce a "block" agenda entry on
each day inside the range.

* Conference <2026-07-15 Wed 14:00-16:00>
Time-range timestamp; body active timestamps still surface as agenda
entries on the queried day.
